comment: 44yo female, asymptomatic, confirmed germline PMS2 pathogenic variant (c.137G>T, p.Ser46Ile) on cascade panel after father's CRC at 67 (MMR-IHC PMS2-loss, segregation confirmed). Lower-penetrance Lynch phenotype (PMS2 CRC ~25-30% lifetime, endometrial ~15-20%, lower than MLH1/MSH2). Engine fires RF-LYNCH-CONFIRMED-CARRIER → routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-LYNCH-CARRIER-SURVEILLANCE (colonoscopy q2-3y from 30-35 per NCCN PMS2-specific cadence; endometrial sampling + TVUS q1-2y from 30-35; annual urinalysis; modified vs MLH1/MSH2 protocol); aggressive = IND-LYNCH-CARRIER-INTENSIFIED (+ CAPP2-style aspirin discussion, prophylactic hysterectomy/BSO post-childbearing). Validates v0.2-B Lynch PMS2 lower-penetrance pathway.
